response:
<<Why Can't People Who Are Allergic to Peanuts Live Underwater?>>

Sec. 1  
Allergies to peanuts are immune responses triggered by proteins in the nut  
These responses can cause severe reactions like anaphylaxis  
Underwater environments lack the allergens that trigger these reactions  

* * *  

Sec. 2  
Living underwater requires adaptation to high pressure and low oxygen  
Peanut proteins cannot dissolve in water to cause allergic reactions  
Therefore people with peanut allergies can safely live underwater  

The question is based on a misunderstanding of how allergies work  
Allergies are immune system reactions not related to environmental conditions  
People with peanut allergies can live underwater without risk
